title: Ambush on Daluuj
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=*[[Attack on Emperor Fel]][[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]] *[[Funeral of Kol Skywalker]][[Legacy (2006) 12|''Legacy'' (2006) 12]] |conc= |next=*[[Duel on Socorro]][[Legacy (2006) 2|''Legacy'' (2006) 2]] *[[Fall of Bastion]][[Legacy (2006) 3|''Legacy'' (2006) 3]] *[[Battle of Borosk (137 ABY)|Battle of Borosk]][[Legacy (2006) 4|''Legacy'' (2006) 4]] |image=[[File:AmbushOnDaluuj-SWL2.jpg]] |name=Ambush on Daluuj |conflict=*[[Second Imperial Civil War]] *[[Third Jedi Purge]] |date=[[137 ABY]] |place=[[Daluuj/Legends|Daluuj]] |result=[[New Jedi Order]] victory *Five [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Death/Legends|killed]] *Two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] killed *[[Shado Vao]] joins [[Wolf Sazen]]'s [[Hunting/Legends|hunt]] for [[Cade Skywalker]] |side1=[[One Sith]] |side2=New Jedi Order |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2=Wolf Sazen |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Unidentified Rodian Sith|Rodian Sith]]† *[[Unidentified Aqualish Sith|Aqualish Sith]]† *[[Unidentified Human Sith (Daluuj)|Three]] [[Unidentified Human Sith 2 (Daluuj)|Human]] [[Unidentified Human Sith 3 (Daluuj)|Sith]]† |forces2=*Wolf Sazen *Shado Vao *[[Ahn Rasi Tuum]]†[[Legacy (2006) 25|''Legacy'' (2006) 25]] *A [[Human/Legends|Human]] Jedi† |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=All combatants |casual2=*Ahn Rasi Tuum *Human Jedi |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|It is dangerous for more than one Jedi to gather in a single place these days.|Ahn Rasi Tuum, just prior to the ambush|}} In [[137 ABY]], five members of the [[One Sith]] '''ambushed''' a gathering of four [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Daluuj/Legends|Daluuj]]. The [[New Jedi Order|Jedi Order]] had been scattered throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] following [[Battle of Coruscant (Sith–Imperial War)|the]] [[Massacre at Ossus|devastation]] of their ranks by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] seven [[Standard year/Legends|years]] [[130 ABY|prior]], and the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Galactic Empire]] had been [[Third Jedi Purge|hunting down]] survivors in the [[Time/Legends|time]] since. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Wolf Sazen]] believed that his wayward former [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Cade Skywalker]]—heir to the legacy of the legendary [[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalker family]]—was the only one who could lead a unified Jedi resistance against the Sith, and he accordingly arranged to meet with three other Jedi on Daluuj in order to request their help in locating Skywalker. Sazen, Master [[Ahn Rasi Tuum]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Shado Vao]], and a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] Jedi gathered on a bridge on Daluuj's surface, where Sazen outlined his beliefs to his colleagues, all the while unaware that a group of Sith was watching them from the shadows. The Sith soon attacked and quickly [[Death/Legends|killed]] both Tuum and the Human female, but Sazen and Vao fought back. [[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsaber]] strikes, [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinesis]], and firm kicks allowed them to slay all five of their opponents. The attack prompted Vao to admit that he no longer wished to hide from the Sith, and he thus agreed to join in Sazen's quest to locate Skywalker. The two left the scene to begin their [[Hunting/Legends|hunt]] and soon after found their quarry on the planet [[Vendaxa/Legends|Vendaxa]]. ==Prelude== {{Quote|I promise you this. If you live, I will find you, Cade Skywalker.|Wolf Sazen, after the Massacre of Ossus|}} In [[130 ABY]], the [[Fel Empire|Galactic Empire]] and its [[One Sith|Sith]] allies staged a two-front attack on the [[New Jedi Order|Jedi Order]], [[Battle of Coruscant (Sith–Imperial War)|laying]] [[Massacre at Ossus|siege]] to the [[New Jedi Temple|Jedi]] [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Temples]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]. The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kol Skywalker]] was among the many [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Death/Legends|killed]], and his son [[Cade Skywalker|Cade]] was also believed to have perished. However, Cade's Master—the [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Wolf Sazen]]—was skeptical, having not felt the younger Skywalker's death in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. As he fled from Ossus in a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], Sazen vowed to track his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] down. Shortly thereafter, the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Krayt]] [[Attack on Emperor Fel|seized]] control of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and his [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|new Empire]] spent seven [[Standard year/Legends|years]] actively [[Third Jedi Purge|hunting down]] surviving Jedi.''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'' Scattered throughout the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], the Jedi Order was unable to mount a unified resistance. After receiving a [[Force vision/Legends|Force vision]], Sazen believed that Cade Skywalker—a member of the legendary [[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalker family]]—was the only person under whom the Jedi could rally together to oppose the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. In [[137 ABY]], as the [[Second Imperial Civil War]] raged across the galaxy, Sazen listened to the Force and concluded that the [[Time/Legends|time]] was right to gather Jedi together and begin searching for his former pupil. ==The ambush== {{Quote|Masters!''"
"Sith!''|A female Human Jedi and Wolf Sazen, reacting to Ahn Rasi Tuum's death|}} [[File:Sazen_fighting_on_Daluuj.jpg|thumb|left|275px|Wolf Sazen and Shado Vao finish off their opponents.]] Sazen was able to locate two Jedi: a Human [[Gender/Legends|female]] and the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Shado Vao]], both of whom he arranged to meet with on the planet [[Daluuj/Legends|Daluuj]]. Vao in turn contacted the [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] Master{{CSWECite|II|269|Tuum, Rasi}} [[Ahn Rasi Tuum]], who also agreed to attend the gathering. When Sazen arrived at the rendezvous point—a bridge lined with the severed heads of [[Droid/Legends|droids]] mounted on [[Spear/Legends|spears]]—he found his three brethren waiting for him. Unbeknownst to any of them, the Jedi had been tracked to the bridge by a group of Sith, who observed their meeting from the shadows. With Sazen now present, Vao surmised that the Zabrak wished to begin [[Hunting/Legends|hunting]] for Skywalker, and Tuum voiced his belief that Sazen's former Padawan was dead. Sazen remained firm that Skywalker was alive and explained why he felt that searching for the young Human was necessary. At that moment, the Sith announced their presence by throwing a spear through Tuum's chest, which killed the Cathar and sent him tumbling off of the bridge. The three remaining Jedi ignited their [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] as five Sith leapt into view. Blades [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|clashed]] as a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]] erupted, and a [[Unidentified Human Sith (Daluuj)|Human Sith warrior]] cut down the Human Jedi before kicking her off of the bridge. Despite the loss of their comrades, Sazen and Vao were able to kill all five of their opponents via their weapons, well-placed kicks, and exertions of [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinesis]]. The last two to fall were a [[Unidentified Rodian Sith|Rodian]] and an [[Unidentified Aqualish Sith|Aqualish]], who were [[Sai cha/Legends|decapitated]] by Sazen and [[Sai tok/Legends|bisected]] at the waist by Vao, respectively. With their foes vanquished, Vao admitted that he was tired of hiding from the Sith and that he wished to become a hunter. He pledged himself to Sazen's quest, and the two walked away from the battlefield to begin searching for Skywalker. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|The Sith won't let us hide. Besides, I'm tired of hiding—of being hunted. I'd rather be the hunter. Might as well start with Cade. Where do we begin?|Shado Vao, to Wolf Sazen|}} Not long afterward, Vao received an emergency [[Holocomm/Legends|holocomm]] message from his sister [[Astraal Vao|Astraal]].[[Legacy (2006) 5|''Legacy'' (2006) 5]] The holocomm signal she used was one they had developed as [[Youngling/Legends|children]] to be broadcast whenever one of them was in danger, in which case they would meet on the planet [[Vendaxa/Legends|Vendaxa]]. Sazen and Vao made their way to the pre-arranged meeting site on Vendaxa's surface, where they found Astraal and her friend [[Marasiah Fel]] on the run from Sith agents and in the company of the crew of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] [[Mynock (Helot-class)|''Mynock'']]. The ship was [[Captain/Legends|captained]] by none other than Skywalker, who had rejected his Jedi legacy and turned to a life of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunting]] after the death of his [[Parent/Legends|father]]. Although he was unswayed by appeals that Sazen made to his past, he did pick up a [[Imperial Knight lightsaber|lightsaber]][[Legacy (2006) 6|''Legacy'' (2006) 6]] and join in a [[Skirmish on Vendaxa|fight]] against the Sith agents who had pursued Fel and Astraal to Vendaxa.[[Legacy (2006) 7|''Legacy'' (2006) 7]] ==Behind the scenes== The ambush appeared in the [[Legacy (2006) 2|second issue]] of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]''. The issue was written by [[John Ostrander]], penciled by [[Jan Duursema]], and released by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[July 12]], [[2006]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54720/star_wars_legacy_2006_2|text=Star Wars: Legacy (2006) #2}} ==Appearances== *[[Legacy (2006) 2|''Legacy'' (2006) 2]] {{1st}} *[[Legacy (2006) 25|''Legacy'' (2006) 25]] {{Imo}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|89|The Art of War (Star Wars Insider 89)}} {{Po}} *{{CSWECite|III||Tuum, Rasi''," "''Vao, Shado}} *''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'' {{C|under "Wolf Sazen"}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{SecondImperialCivilWarNav}} {{ThirdJediPurgeNav}} {{Interlang |de=Scharmützel von Daluuj |es=Emboscada en Daluuj |pl=Konklawe na Daluuj |fi=Väijytys Daluujissa }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Daluuj, ambush on}} [[Category:Battles of Daluuj]] [[Category:Battles of the Second Imperial Civil War]] [[Category:Battles of the Third Jedi Purge]] [[Category:Duels]]
